markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Swift Playgrounds

A curated list of awesome Swift playgrounds.

Contributing

Please take a quick look at the contribution guidelines first. Thanks to all contributors; you rock!

If you see a playground here that does not work anymore with the current release of Xcode or is not a good fit, please submit a pull request to improve this file or consider updating it, thank you!

Downloading all the playgrounds

Unless otherwise indicated, all playgrounds are compatible with Swift 3.

All the playgrounds are available as submodules in the playgrounds/ directory, to download them all in one go, just clone this repository with git clone --recursive https://github.com/uraimo/Awesome-Swift-Playgrounds.git or execute git submodule update --init after you have cloned the repository the usual way.

Apple's playgrounds distributed as zip archives have to be downloaded manually.

Tags

🌟 = My personal favorites

🍁 = Swift 4+ Playground

⏳ = Pre-Swift 3 Playground

PlaygroundBooks

Playgrounds that can be run on your iPad

  • Guilloche Pattern Playground Bookstars12 - Learn more about this pattern you see every day, but probably never knew it was really carefully designed. 🍁
  • Accessibilitystars4 - Accessibility for iOS developers. 🍁
  • TJBot Playgroundstars31 - Swift Playground for interacting with IBM's TJBot. 🍁
  • Tree Trouble Playbookstars21 - An interactive Swift Playground Book about Binary Search Trees.
  • Auto Pongstars11 - A tutorial to implement a pong based on a simple AI.
  • Neural Network Playgroundstars371 - A neural network Swift playground, with no third party dependencies.
  • Window Manager Playgroundstars39 - Playground for an experimental window manager.
  • AudioKit Playground Bookstars146 - A set of playgrounds using AudioKit designed for the iPad Playgrounds app.
  • Numswstars128 - A swift playground book that mimics some of the features of numpy and jupyter notebook.
  • File Browser Playgroundstars199 - Simple File Browser for Swift Playgrounds on iOS.
  • Geometry with Swiftstars7 - In this course your students will learn the fundamentals of Swift 3 programming, using geometry as their context for learning.
  • Image Filteringstars72 - A Swift playgroundbook about Image Filtering. 🍁🌟
  • Spacetime Rhapsodystars19 - A Swift Playground visualizing gravity based on Einstein's Theory of General Relativity. 🌟
  • Neural Networkstars48 - A Swift PlaygroundBook about Neural Networks. 🍁
  • coreml-playgroundstars29 - Core ML examples for Swift Playgrounds. 🍁
  • SF Symbols Viewerstars10 - An SF Symbols Viewer for Swift Playgrounds. 🍁
  • jscore-playgroundstars12 - A JavaScript REPL using JavaScriptCore. 🍁
  • Accessible Realitystars13 - for learning the basics of ARKit through interactive lessons. 🍁

Learning Swift

Some interesting playgrounds to learn Swift

  • What's new in Swift 4stars1.9k - An Xcode playground showing off the new features in Swift 4.0. 🍁 🌟
  • What's new in Swift 4.2stars894 - An Xcode playground showing off the new features in Swift 4.2. 🍁 🌟
  • Codable Playgroundstars15 - Playground that demonstrates advanced uses of Codable. 🍁
  • Generics In Swift - Playground that explains generics. 🍁
  • Swift String Cheat Sheetstars56 - A quick guide to using Strings with Swift. 🍁
  • About Swiftstars61 - A playground about Swift language. 🍁
  • The Swift Programming Language Playgroundsstars203 - 40+ playgrounds, one for each chapter of Apple's Swift book. 🌟
  • Swift Hack Packstars17 - Collection of playgrounds that teaches Swift.
  • The Swift Summary Bookstars1.7k - A summary of Apple's Swift language. 🌟
  • Swifter Tipsstars124 - Examples for every feature of the Swift language.
  • MPCS51032 UChicago iOS Coursestars8 - Playgrounds from the 2017 Spring iOS course of the University of Chicago.

Learning Swift: Advanced Topics

Advanced topics, useful once you have mastered the basics of the language

  • A Swift Introduction to Core Datastars141 - Learn Core Data experimenting directly in this playground. 🌟
  • TDDSwiftPlaygroundstars49 - Demonstration of using Swift Playgrounds in Test Driven Development with XCTest.
  • Concurrency on iOSstars31 - Concurrency and Parallelism in iOS.
  • Modern Core Datastars33 - An introduction to Core Data.
  • Swift DSL Examplestars17 - Implementation of a DSL in Swift.
  • Katanstars23 - A micro web server that replies "Hello world!" to every request, an example of how to use sockets in Swift.
  • Swift Regular Expressionsstars6 - A playground to learn regular expressions with Swift.
  • Network Stackstars27 - Clean & simple Swift networking stack playground.
  • Swiftly Typed Resourcesstars72 - A playground showing how Swift makes Strings, Colors, Fonts, Images, etc easier to deal with. ⏳
  • Swift KVO Closuresstars11 - Swift KVO playground. ⏳
  • Swift Date Tutorialstars7 - Learn everythig about NSDate. ⏳
  • Swift And Cstars6 - Examples about using C with Swift. ⏳
  • Swift Memory Managementstars3 - How to avoid retain cycles, from this post. ⏳

Design Patterns

  • The Principles of OOD in Swift 4stars1.7k - The Principles of OOD based on Uncle Bob articles.🍁
  • Design Patterns Playgroundstars26 - Learning GoF's Design Patterns in Swift 3.
  • iOS Design Patternsstars122 - Sample projects for MVC, MVP, MVVM, and VIPER.
  • Design Patterns in Swiftstars12.6k - Design patterns in Swift 3.
  • GOF Swiftstars100 - Learn all 23 Gang of Four patterns using Swift.

Protocol Oriented Programming

  • Swift Diagram Playgroundsstars264 - Adaptation of the Protocol-Oriented Programming in Swift talk from WWDC 2015.
  • Swift Protocol Extensionsstars20 - A playground to explore Protocol Extensions. ⏳
  • Battleship Examplestars13 - An example of how to use Protocol Oriented Programming with the battleship game. ⏳

Functional Reactive Programming

  • ReactiveCocoa Playgroundstars97 - The easiest way to get a taste of ReactiveCocoa. ⏳
  • Swift Reactive Playgroundstars27 - Companion to the article: ReactiveCocoa made Simple With Swift. ⏳

Apple's Playgrounds

Playgrounds from Apple, usually presented at some WWDC

  • Apple's Mandelbrot Playgroundstars21 - A playground with the mandelbrot fractal (updated to Swift 3 by @palmerc, @kemalenver).
  • Interactive Newton's Cradle - Apple's interactive playground of a Newton's Cradle where collisions and gravity are applyed with UIKit dynamics. 🌟 (updated to Swift 3 by @p-sun)
  • Apple's Balloons Playground - The balloons playground showed at WWDC14. ⏳
  • Apple's Crustacean Playground - Protocol-Oriented Programming with Value Types. ⏳
  • Apple's Swift Standard Library Playground - experiment with Swift standard library types and high-level concepts using visualizations and practical examples. ⏳

WWDC Students Submissions

Playgrounds submitted by students for the WWDC scholarship

  • 2021stars50
  • 2020stars188
  • 2019stars277
  • 2018stars261
  • 2017stars241
  • 2016stars79
  • 2015stars125
  • 2014stars181

Playgrounds about Playgrounds

Playgrounds that describe what you can do with playgrounds

  • XCTest Playgroundstars50 - Better looking tests for playgrounds.
  • Interactive Playgroundstars51 - Exploring interactivity in Playgrounds.
  • Mondrianstars3 - Make iOS app mockups in Swift 2.x playgrounds. ⏳

Playgrounds from Playgroundbooks

Playgrounds derived from iPad Swift Playgroundbooks

  • iPad Swift Playgroundsstars20 - The sample playgroundbooks converted to playgrounds.

Theoretical Computer Science

  • Functional Debug Viewstars36 - Playground to visualize functional programming with graphical sequences. 🍁 🌟
  • OOP with Functions in Swiftstars59 - Object-Oriented Programming in Functional Programming in Swift. 🍁
  • Logicianstars182 - Logic programming in Swift. 🌟
  • Function Composition in Swiftstars58 - Exploration of function composition in Swift. 🌟
  • Swift Adventures in Monad Landstars166 - Learn about monads.
  • Functional Design Patternsstars4 - A few functional programming concept and patterns.
  • Learn about transducersstars80 - A little tutorial that explains transducers. ⏳
  • Swift Functors, Applicatives, and Monads in Picturesstars67 - Companion to the article: Swift Functors, Applicatves, and Monads in Pictures. ⏳
  • Functors in Swiftstars6 - A playground to introduce Functors in Swift, and their practical usage. ⏳

Algorithms and Data Structures

Algorithms and data structures implemented in Swift

  • Animated Sorting Algorithmsstars16 - Swift 4 playgrounds to view and manipulate sorting algorithms.🍁
  • Expressionsstars399 - Arithmetic and logical expressions elegantly modeled and visualized using protocol-oriented binary trees.🍁
  • Swift Algorithm Clubstars24.8k - Algorithms and data structures in Swift with explanations. 🌟
  • Sorting Experimentsstars4 - Alluring experiments with sorting algorithms in Swift, sort of.
  • Visual Binary Treesstars52 - Effortless visualization of arbitrary Binary Trees, along with their pluggable traversal implementations. 🌟
  • Julia Fractal Playgroundstars239 - A Swift playground that generates beautiful Julia set fractal images.
  • A Starstars30 - Protocol oriented A* pathfinding algorithm implementation in Swift 4.🍁
  • Sorting Algorithmsstars0 - Live Visualization of some famous sorting algorithms and your experiments.
  • DataStructures Playgroundstars14 - Data Structures and Algorithms in Swift. ⏳
  • Swiftographystars7 - Standard cryptographic algorithms in a Swift Playground. ⏳
  • Algorithms Playgroundstars5 - Various algorithm implementation in Swift. ⏳
  • The Jelly Bean Problemstars2 - The Jelly Bean problem from Wait But Why. ⏳
  • Euclidean Stringsstars1 - A playground leveraging ReSwift to generate Euclidean Strings. ⏳

Languages

Programming language interpreters implemented in Swift

  • Introduction to Compilersstars380 - Great introduction to the inner workings of compilers. 🍁🌟
  • Pascal Interpreterstars272 - Simple Swift interpreter for the Pascal language inspired by the Let’s Build A Simple Interpreter article series. 🍁
  • Write your own language: Mustars1.1k - A playground explaining how to create a tiny programming language named Mu. 🌟
  • ASM Swiftstars94 - A playground for learning Assembly language through Swift. 🌟
  • Let's build a compiler in Swiftstars155 - Let's Build a Compiler by Jack Crenshaw translated to Swift Playgrounds. 🌟
  • Register VMstars5 - A register-based VM in a Swift playground. 🌟 ⏳
  • Turtle Playgroundstars125 - A playground with Logo-like commands. 🌟 ⏳
  • Swift Brainfuckstars8 - Brainfuck interpreter written in Swift using Playground. ⏳

Machine Learning

  • Emoji Intelligencestars1.3k - Neural Network built in Apple Playground using Swift. 🌟

UIKit And Graphics

A list of playgrounds that demostrate various aspect of UIKit and other graphical frameworks

  • UIStackView Playgroundstars318 - Interesting examples of use of UIStackViews.🌟
  • Bezier Path Playgroundsstars26 - Some playgrounds to better understand UIBezierPaths.
  • UIKit playgroundstars42 - Playgrounds to experiment interactively with UIKit views.
  • UIDynamic Playgroundstars4 - Multiple Playgrounds using almost every behaviour of UIDynamic.
  • WWDC16 Typographystars7 🇯🇵 - Draw a logo or any text with the WWDC16 ASCII texture.
  • Animated GIF Playgroundstars1 - Swift playground for generating animated GIFs.
  • RPClaritystars41 - Shows a technique for blurring an image behind the characters behind one or more UILabels. ⏳
  • Swift Clockstars28 - An animated clock in a swift playground. ⏳
  • WatchKit Asset Playgroundstars7 - A swift playground for creating awesome animations for your WatchKit Apps. ⏳
  • Swift 2.0 Protocol Extension Examplestars39 - Showing how to use Swift2 protocol extensions to render errors in UIViews and UIViewControllers without subclassing or creating classes. ⏳
  • Tintingstars0 - A small playground to demonstrate image tinting in UIKit. ⏳
  • Ray tracing Playgroundstars16 - A playground and a series of articles on ray tracing, see also part 2stars6, 3stars7, 4stars3, 5stars5 🌟 ⏳
  • WWDC16 Logo Playground - Drawing the WWDC16 logo in a playground. ⏳

Core Image

  • Interpolation Playgroundstars58 - Playground demonstrating lerp, smooth step, Catcall-Rom and others! ⏳
  • CoreImage for Swift Playgroundsstars78 - Growing collection of CoreImage playgrounds from the upcoming book "CoreImage For Swift". 🌟 ⏳
  • Image Processorstars6 - Implementing different image filter algorithms. ⏳

Metal

  • Metalbrotstars78 - Interactive playground that draws the Mandelbrot fractal with Metal. 🌟
  • METAL Playgroundstars51 - Apple Metal framework playground. 🌟 ⏳

Animations

  • Core Animation Swift Playgroundsstars34 - A set of interesting Core Animation playgounds.
  • UIViewPropertyAnimator Playgroundstars32 - Playground demonstrating UIViewPropertyAnimator.
  • WWDC Crowd Simulator 2017stars29 - A SpriteKit experiment to simulate the WWDC2017 logo crowd.
  • Duet-Inspired Trail Effectstars22 - How to get a Duet style trailing effect in SpriteKit.
  • Additive Animationsstars33 - Experiment with multiple additive animations in Core Animation. ⏳
  • Core Animation Playgroundstars7 - Companion to Apple's Core Animation Programming Guide. ⏳
  • Core Animation Timingstars1 - Playground demonstrating effects of CAMediaTiming properties. 🍁

SpriteKit

  • SceneKit ARKit Demostars45 - The Xcode 9 ARKit SpriteKit demo as a playground.🍁
  • SpriteKit Swift 3stars7 - Playground for exploring Sprite Kit.
  • SpriteKit Collisionsstars30 - Demonstrates how to perform physics collision detection using Swift and SpriteKit. ⏳
  • SceneKit Examplesstars18 - Experiment with SceneKit and Swift. ⏳
  • Astronomystars16 - A 3D earth model written in swift playground using SceneKit.

Audio

Sounds and music

  • Bach Playgroundstars2 - A Simple Swift Playground that plays a brief piece by Bach with AVAudioEngine and AVMIDIPlayer.
  • PlayerNode Playgroundstars2 - Playground using AVAudioEngine with a playernode and effects to play an audio file. 🌟
  • Milesstars23 - A Swift Playground that creates jazz improvisations in any key using AudioToolbox and AVFoundation.

Mathematics

Live math with playgrounds

  • Guilloche Pattern Playground Bookstars12 - Learn more about this pattern you see every day, but probably never knew it was really carefully designed. 🍁
  • Lindenmayer Systemsstars11 - A Swift playground exploring Lindemayer systems.
  • Swift Natural Numbersstars3 - A playground for implementing the natural numbers and more concepts in number theory.
  • Polydoxicalstars0 - Interactive playground to experiment with roulettes and polygons.
  • Abstract Algebrastars184 - Abstract algebra concepts implemented in Swift.
  • Swift Acceleratestars108 - Using the Accelerate framework and Swift for Linear Algebra. ⏳
  • Swifty Mathematicsstars1 - A collection of swift playground about mathematics. ⏳
  • Numerical Algorithms - Numerical argorithms playground from Ray Wenderlich. ⏳

Libraries and APIs

Library tutorials, in a playground

  • AudioKit Playgrounds - 130+ Audio synthesis, processing, playback, and analysis playgrounds with AudioKit.
  • AIToolbox - A set of playgrounds showing machine learning algorithms, all implemented with pieces of the AIToolbox framework code.
  • Cognitive Service APIsstars51 - Get started with the Microsoft Cognitive Services APIs.
  • Rx Playgroundstars6 - A playground with RxSwift examples.

Playground Sets

Sets of playgrounds about various topics

  • Parks And Recreationstars164 - Great collection of interesting playgrounds, for fun and for profit. 🍁🌟
  • URaimo's Playgroundsstars134 - My playgrounds, various topics. 🍁
  • Public Extensionsstars299 - A set of useful extensions from @PublicExtension. 🌟
  • ManuelCarlos's Playgrouds - Various playgrounds.
  • Mgrebenets's Playgroundsstars8 - Various playgrounds.c 🌟
  • Cocoa With Love Playgroundsstars87 - Playground versions of select articles from Cocoa with Love. 🌟
  • Sketchytech's Playgroundsstars7 - Various Playgrounds. 🌟 ⏳
  • Swift fun playgroundsstars8 - A few playgrounds to showcase Swift peculiar features. ⏳
  • BradLarson's Playgroundsstars20 - Various playgrounds. ⏳
  • Dmikusa's Playgroundsstars15 - Playgrounds that show basic Swift, JSON parsing, sending HTTP requests and basic file IO. ⏳
  • Cananito's Playgroundsstars1 - Various playgrounds. ⏳
  • Uberbruns's Playgroundsstars4 - Various playgrounds. ⏳

Miscellaneous

What doesn't fit anywhere else, but still awesome

  • Rubik's Cubestars13 - Implementing basic model and behavior of Rubic's Cube in Swift. 🍁
  • Icon Creatorstars34 - Create app icons on Swift playground.
  • 2048 Playgroundstars40 - The 2048 game implemented with a playground.
  • SwiftShellstars20 - Bash shell in a playground.
  • LaunchPad Playgroundstars5 - A playground that simulates a real LaunchPad for making music.
  • Super Mazestars7 - A programmatic maze generator and solver.
  • Tic Tac Toestars6 - Tic tac toe in a playground.
  • Pixel Art Makerstars81 - A playground where you can make pixel art.
  • SwiftCoinstars29 - A simplistic blockchain & cryptocurrency in a playground.
  • SentimentlySwiftstars9 - Sentiment analysis in Swift.
  • SwiftChainstars6 - Simple Cryptocurrency in a Swift Playground.
  • Game Boardsstars177 - Chess, checkers, tic-tac-toe, sudoku and many others in playground. 🌟 ⏳
  • StarWars Sealsstars3 - Emblems from Star Wars in Swift playgrounds via CoreGraphics and UIViews. ⏳
  • SwiftFilesstars37 - Save, Load and Delete files easily from within a Swift playground. ⏳
  • Earth photosstars5 - A slideshow of Earth photos taken by DSCOVR/EPIC. 🌟 ⏳
